desc: Magic 8-Ball game for Garmin smartwatches. 1. Shake your wrist to ask a question 2. Watch the shaking animation 3. Get your mystical answer with sparkle effects - Accelerometer-based shake detection

Knife-hit style arcade game for Garmin smartwatches. 1. A circular log rotates in the center of the screen 2. Tap to throw an axe — it flies up and sticks into the log 3. Avoid hitting axes already stuck in the log 4. Survive as many throws as possible

Classic Sea Battle for Garmin watches. Place your fleet on a 10×10 grid, hunt the enemy fleet, and try to sink everything before the AI sinks you. A full Battleship game with three AI difficulty levels: - **Easy** — random shots, no memory. - **Medium** — remembers a hit and probes adjacent cells. - **Hard** — classic HUNT/TARGET with parity-aware hunting (only shoots cells where the smallest rema

Free-for-all artillery deathmatch on a scrolling battlefield. Destroy all enemy blobs before they destroy you. Turn-based FFA combat on randomly generated terrain with a map **2x wider than the screen**. Camera scrolls to follow the action. You (blue blob) fight 2–4 AI enemies that scale in number and toughness. | Input | Action | |-------|--------| | **Tilt** (accelerometer) | Move blob (MOVE pha

Retro bomb dropping arcade game for Garmin smartwatches. 1. Steer your plane left/right by tilting your wrist 2. Tap to drop a bomb 3. Bombs fall with gravity and wind drift 4. Hit enemies on the ground for chain reaction explosions

**Breath Coaching System** dla zegarkow Garmin — LITE-like launcher z nadbudowana warstwa inteligencji (rekomendacja, readiness, adaptacja). HOME zachowuje szybkosc i layout wersji LITE, a coach dziala w tle i podpowiada pasywnie. Uzywa tych samych piec slotow quick-start co LITE (*Last Used* / BR / CO2 / O2 / AP), dodaje **przezroczysty overlay rekomendacji** ("REC CO2 HARD", "REST ADVISED", "PLA

**Deterministic timer-based freediving tool** dla zegarkow Garmin. LITE to **czyste narzedzie** — bez coacha, bez adaptacji, bez rekomendacji, bez planow, bez interpretacji wynikow. Tylko 4 tryby, presety, licznik PB, statystyki jako czyste liczby, customizacja i factory reset. Instant start w 1 kliknieciu. Kazda sesja to deterministyczny timer z formulami zapisanymi na sztywno. --- | Stan | Staa
Medieval catapult siege game for Garmin smartwatches. 1. Set your launch angle 2. Set your power 3. Fire a projectile at the enemy castle 4. Destroy the castle and defeat the enemy boss

Cellular automata battle simulator for Garmin round watches (Connect IQ). Watch armies of living cells fight for territory using eight different evolutionary algorithms — or just sit back and let a single ruleset evolve in silence. ![Bitochi Cell Wars hero](../_LOGOS/cellwars_hero.png) ---

A classic Connect Four game for round Garmin watches. Drop coloured discs into a **7×6** grid and connect **4 in a row** — before the AI does. - You play as **Red**, the AI plays as **Yellow**. - Select a column with LEFT/RIGHT, then drop your disc with SELECT. - Discs fall by gravity to the lowest empty row.

Chrome-style endless T-Rex runner for Garmin round watches (Connect IQ). Press any button, survive as long as possible, unlock new abilities as your score grows. ![Bitochi Dino Run hero](../_LOGOS/dinosaur_hero.png) --- A chubby dinosaur sprints from left to right. Obstacles scroll in from the right — cacti on the ground and, in later stages, flapping pterodactyls in mid-air. Jump over them, duck

A fast, outdoor-optimised dive planning tool for on-deck use between dives. Designed for maximum legibility in bright sunlight: near-black background + full-brightness verdict boxes. --- Three independent planning modes accessible from a single tap-to-select screen. Every mode delivers a **single, large, coloured verdict box** — readable at arm's length in full sun.

A fast, reliable, professional dive planning tool for recreational scuba divers. > **This app is NOT a dive computer and NOT a decompression planner.** > It is a quick decision-support tool used **before and between dives**. --- | Calculator | What it tells you |

A classic pencil-and-paper strategy game built for Garmin smartwatches in Monkey C. --- Players alternate drawing lines between adjacent dots on a 5 × 5 grid. When a player draws the **fourth side** of a box, they **claim it and take another turn**. The player who claims more of the 16 boxes wins.

A minimalist circular survival game designed specifically for **round Garmin watches**. You are locked to the **edge of the screen**. Everything spawns from the centre and races toward you. ![hero](../_LOGOS/edgesurvivor_hero.png) --- The player's position is defined entirely by a single **angle** (0–359 °) on a fixed circle. There is no jumping, no grid — just smooth angular movement and one life

> Your secret emergency escape system on your wrist. --- Escape Kit displays ultra-realistic fake notification screens on your Garmin watch so you can gracefully exit uncomfortable situations, break focus loops, or reset your attention — without explanation. **Credibility is the #1 priority.** Every fake screen is designed to look authentic at a glance. ---

Fishing game with casting and fish fighting for Garmin smartwatches. 1. Tap to start the power bar, tap again to cast 2. Wait for a bite — react quickly when "BITE!" appears 3. Fight the fish by countering its pulls with wrist movement 4. Keep line tension balanced: too high = snap, too low = escape

A Garmin-flavoured "Flappy Bird" clone — tap to flap, skim through the gaps between obstacles, and chase your best distance as the world scrolls faster and faster. An endless-runner with very simple kinematics (one vertical velocity, one gravity constant) and procedurally generated obstacle pillars. The pidgeon is drawn procedurally (no PNG sprites), so the game runs identically on every screen si

A snappy match-3 time-attack game for Garmin watches — swap adjacent gems, line up three or more in a row or column, and chase cascading combos before the 90-second timer runs out. Bejeweled-style match-3 distilled to fit a watch. The board is a flat integer array (no per-cell objects), match detection runs in two passes per swap, gravity + refill are iterative, and cascades up to depth 8 are reso

A compact adaptation of the classic Gobblet strategy game, built for Garmin smartwatches in Monkey C. --- Players alternate placing or moving pieces on a **4 × 4 grid**. **Win** by getting **4 pieces in a row** (row, column, or diagonal) with your *top-visible* pieces. A larger piece can be placed on top of any smaller piece, covering it.

A text-based word-guessing game for Garmin watches. Pick from four categories and three difficulty tiers, then tap your way through the on-screen keyboard before the gallows fills in. A faithful Hangman with a notebook-paper visual style. Words come from a built-in offline list grouped by category and length. The on-screen keyboard layout adapts to the watch screen and uses a very forgiving hit-te

A Hex board game for round Garmin watches. Connect your two opposite sides of a **7×7** parallelogram grid before the AI does. Hex is a two-player connection game invented by Piet Hein (1942) and John Nash (1948). | Colour | Player | Objective | |--------|--------|-----------|

A Doodle-Jump-style endless climber for Garmin watches. Bounce up an infinite tower of snow-capped platforms, dodge breakables, ride moving platforms, launch off springs, and chase your best height. A vertical infinite-runner with procedural platform generation and a screen-relative physics pass — gravity, jump velocity, and horizontal speed all scale with the watch's screen height so the jump arc

A polish card game for Garmin watches — match cards by rank or suit, and use special cards to outmanoeuvre the AI opponent. Makao is the Polish equivalent of Crazy Eights / UNO. Be the first player to empty your hand. A card may be played if it matches the **top card of the discard pile** by:

Classic Minesweeper for Garmin watches — six board sizes from 16² up to a monster **100×100** with a scrolling viewport, safe-first-click, iterative flood-fill, persisted best-times per size. A full Minesweeper port that scales gracefully across screen sizes. Boards up to 32² fit on-screen fully; bigger boards switch to a scrolling window that re-centres on the cursor, with a mini-map showing wher

A full 9×9 Go game for round Garmin watches (fenix, epix, fr, venu, vivoactive series). Go is the world's oldest board game — two players (Black and White) take turns placing stones on a 9×9 grid. The goal is to surround more territory than your opponent while capturing their stones. --- | Rule | Implementation |

A full Nine Men's Morris (Mill) game for round Garmin watches. Play all three phases — place, move, and fly — against an AI opponent. Nine Men's Morris is a two-player strategy game dating back to ancient Rome. | Colour | Player | Objective | |--------|--------|-----------|

A complete Othello (Reversi) game for round Garmin watches with flip animation and a position-weight AI opponent. --- | Rule | Detail | |------|--------| | **Board** | 8×8 grid, starting with 2 Black + 2 White discs in the centre. |

3D perspective parachute game for Garmin smartwatches. 1. Jump from the plane 2. Freefall — steer toward the landing zone 3. Open your chute before it's too late 4. Navigate through rings for bonus points

Virtual pet game for Garmin smartwatches. 1. Choose your pet type from the selection screen 2. Feed, play with, and care for your pixel creature 3. Keep hunger, happiness, and health in balance 4. Play mini-games to earn rewards

A NES-arcade-style pinball game for Garmin watches with five hand-crafted tables, multi-ball, drop targets, slingshots, a launch power meter, and substep-stable flipper physics. Five distinct tables (Classic / Nova / Derby / Stinger / Eclipse) sharing a tuned physics engine. Up to three balls can be in play simultaneously (multi-ball is awarded by clearing the drop-target bank). The renderer is a

A polished Pong for Garmin Connect IQ — you vs. AI, first to the score limit wins, with three AI difficulty levels and proper paddle-hold physics. Classic Pong with deliberately tuned physics: angle reflection on paddle contact, vertical "english" added based on where the ball hits, and a small speed boost per paddle hit so rallies escalate. AI ranges from a simple ball-tracker (Easy) to a predict

Monster escape horror game for Garmin smartwatches. 1. Enter the dungeon and scan for monsters with your radar 2. When a monster is found — RUN! 3. Survive the chase and escape 4. Face increasingly dangerous creatures

An endless runner for Garmin round-face watches with a unique twist: **your past runs come back to haunt you as shadow clones.** ![hero](../_LOGOS/shadowclonerunner_hero.png) --- You control a small ninja-like runner jumping and ducking over obstacles. On every subsequent run, a **ghost clone** of your previous run replays at the same position on screen — and you must avoid it just as you would av

Ski jumping game with realistic physics for Garmin smartwatches. 1. Select your jumper 2. Ride down the in-run hill 3. Tap to take off at the right moment 4. Control your balance in flight with wrist tilt

Endless one-tap block-stacking game. Each level a block slides across the screen — tap to drop it on top of the tower. The overhang is trimmed away, the next block gets narrower, and the camera scrolls up as the tower grows. How high can you build? A wrist-friendly take on "Stack" / "Tower Tap". The game lives in world coordinates and the renderer pans the camera so the player always sees the top

Classic Sudoku for Garmin Connect IQ — solve a 4×4 quick game in a coffee break, or settle in for a full 9×9 Easy / Medium / Hard puzzle on your wrist. A complete on-watch Sudoku with handcrafted difficulty curves. Puzzles are generated from a bank of pre-baked solutions and re-symbolised on the fly, so every game is unique but the runtime cost stays well inside the device's watchdog budget (no re

A simplified Go-like territory control game for Garmin watches. Place Black stones to surround territory and capture White (AI) groups. Control more territory than the AI when the game ends. 9×9 intersection grid. You play **Black**, the AI plays **White**. Players alternate placing one stone per turn on any empty intersection.

A 5×5 Tic-Tac-Toe variant for round Garmin watches where you need **4 in a row** to win. - You play as **X** (blue), the AI plays as **O** (red-orange). - Place four marks in a row — horizontally, vertically, or diagonally — to win. - If all 25 cells are filled without a winner, the game ends in a draw. - The session score (X wins : O wins) persists across games until you exit.

A full 2048 clone for Garmin watches. Slide tiles in one of four directions, merge equal-valued tiles, and try to reach the **2048** tile — or just chase your best score. A clean, lightweight 2048 with the original rules. Tiles are stored as exponents in a flat `Number` array (0 = empty, 1 = "2", 2 = "4", …) so merge logic is just integer comparisons. Movement on every device works through a manua

Timberman-style lumberjack arcade game for Garmin smartwatches. 1. Tap left or right (or UP/DOWN) to switch sides and chop the tree in one instant move 2. Avoid branches on the side you are standing on 3. Keep chopping before the energy bar runs out 4. Score builds with combo bonuses for fast consecutive chops - Ultra-fast, addictive 10-30 second sessions
